evidence: "I am tired of women leading everything on every show."
"Love the Walking Dead and will be getting the rest of the seasons as they become available!!"
"The story is OK but the twists are what make it."
"The whole getting the North Korean Paratroopers across the Pacific without anyone discovering it was quite far fetched but after that the story gets good."
"A little slow and short on action until the very end."
"Can be slow at time but the unexpected twists make it enjoyable."
"The special effects are not so special but the story made up for it."
"It's not a bad movie at all just not worthy of Ms. Madsen...but her performance was wonderful."
"Love the Walking Dead and will be getting the rest of the seasons as they become available!!"
"I love Virginia Madsen and that is why I purchased it."
"Really enjoyed how much information they packed into such a short time."
"Shailene Woodly really shines. What a talent!"
"Very well acted but oh so sad."
"I really liked the story and the princess was really cute."

summary: The user enjoys a variety of movies and shows, often appreciating strong narratives and emotional depth, though they express mixed feelings about pacing and genre representation. They show a preference for engaging stories over high production quality, indicating a focus on character and plot over visual spectacle.
